svg.title: Momentum Local Development Architecture — Native PostgreSQL
svg.desc: Local dev HLD with app screens in the client layer and native PostgreSQL.

g.text: Android emulator · iOS simulator · physical device via USB

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Task service do in Momentum?')

g.text: Service running at localhost:5432 · no Docker needed

g.text: Ngrok — tunnel localhost to physical device over internet
